title: Tornado Surviving
description: Tornado Surviving is a server that provides a Modpack in order to enjoy a roleplay experience. This Modpack provides the necessities to enjoy a storm chasing experience. As the Modpack updates, new items will be added and custom mods will be enforced.
body:
# **IMPORTANT MESSAGE FROM ELMERPOLITIAN ENTERTAINMENT**
ALL FILES HAVE BEEN FOUND AND UPDATES WILL NOW RESUME FOR TORNADO SURVIVING STARTING NOW! THANK YOU FOR YOUR PATIENCE! 

- Sincerely, Elmerpolitian Entertainment CEO & Founder by Bluified Co-Brands Holdings. 

## **NEW UPDATE OUT NOW FOR TORNADO SURVIVING!!** 5/10/2026
![3.0.1 UPDATE OUT NOW!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c56026785fd6a6e89facc4c5ceb0eec90a55f77d.png)
**_A HUGE UPDATE FOR TORNADO SURVIVING HAS NOW BEEN RELEASED!! CHECK THE UPDATE HERE >_** [CHECK THE LOGS!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/tornado-surviving/version/3.0.0)


# What's Tornado Surviving?
- Tornado Surviving is a multiplayer/singleplayer based gamemode that includes mods that create fun and awesome experience to storm chasing, meteorology, and citizenship. The Modpack includes mods from a variety of different creators that revolve around the new weather mod by _"ProtoManly"_. This Modpack will continiously stay updated with the new features of new addons and mod updates. New ideas will be implmented into this modpack as it gets updated overtime. 

Hope you enjoy this modpack! :D
